summary: Iteration 225 — P1.1 Segmentation Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All segmentation UI features verified. Segmentation card shows when normativa is MISTA, displays summary badges (EN 1090, EN 13241, Generiche, Incerte), per-line table with dropdown selects, save draft and confirm buttons. Blocking works correctly when INCERTA lines present. Validation page shows updated aggregate (81% global, 7/8 correct).

issues: Minor: HTML nesting warning in console (<span> inside <select>) from React dev tools overlay - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: prev_8e8311d22a3c (main user, PRV-2026-0021), prev_eb87b5c85253 (test user, PRV-2026-0002)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1.1 Segmentation feature fully working. Segmentation card (data-testid=card-segmentazione) shows when normativa is MISTA or hasBloccoBloccante. Key data-testids: btn-avvia-segmentazione (before segmentation runs), seg-line-{line_id}, seg-select-{line_id}, btn-seg-bozza, btn-seg-conferma. Validation aggregate now 81% (was 75%), 7/8 correct (was 6/8). Test credentials: main_user_session=fEQQyik5bSdSU_dnWx_8QR1am6kyw543-sOFR12E7sk, test_user_session=test_perizia_205a45704b22

segmenta_endpoint_returns_line_classific.details: POST /api/istruttoria/segmenta/{preventivo_id} returns line_classification, segments, summary with correct structure

segmenta_review_save_draft.details: POST /api/istruttoria/segmenta/{preventivo_id}/review with action=save_draft saves user corrections

segmenta_confirm_blocked_with_incerta.details: Confirm action returns 400 error when INCERTA lines present: 'Non puoi confermare con righe ancora INCERTE'

segmenta_confirm_success_after_classifyi.details: Confirm action succeeds when all lines classified, creates official_segmentation snapshot

istruttoria_has_segmentazione_proposta.details: GET /api/istruttoria/preventivo/{preventivo_id} returns segmentazione_proposta for MISTA preventivi

validation_aggregate_81_percent.details: Validation aggregate shows 81% global score (updated from 75%), 7/8 correct (updated from 6/8)

validation_set_includes_mista_preventivi.details: Validation set includes 2 MISTA preventivi (prev_eb87b5c85253, prev_8e8311d22a3c) with correct ground truth

frontend_segmentation_card_visible.details: Segmentation card (card-segmentazione) visible when normativa is MISTA

frontend_summary_badges.details: Summary badges show EN 1090, EN 13241, Generiche, Incerte counts

frontend_per_line_table.details: Per-line table shows descriptions with dropdown selects for normativa

frontend_dropdown_interaction.details: Dropdown selects work correctly, changing INCERTA to other normativa

frontend_save_draft_button.details: 'Salva bozza' button saves draft and shows success toast

frontend_confirm_button_disabled.details: 'Conferma segmentazione' button disabled when INCERTA lines present

frontend_p03_se_confermi_box.details: P0.3 'Se confermi la commessa' box visible with all 3 sections

frontend_validation_page_aggregate.details: Validation page shows 81% global, 8 preventivi, 7/8 correct

segmenta_endpoint.returns: segmentazione object with enabled, trigger_reason, summary, segments, line_classification

review_save_draft.returns: status: in_review, segmentazione object with updated reviews
